description_long: This is a rectangular box of Essential Waitrose penne pasta, made from 100% Italian durum wheat. The front of the box features a clear window displaying the uncooked penne pasta inside, with a simple illustration of wheat stalks and green grains. The packaging is predominantly white with subtle beige and yellow tones from the pasta, and the brand name and product details are printed in a clean, modern font. The sides of the box also show the penne pasta through transparent panels, emphasizing the product within. The box appears to be made of cardboard with a plastic window, providing both structure and visibility of the contents. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for display in a grocery store or urban food market.
description: A rectangular cardboard box of Essential Waitrose penne pasta with a clear window showing the pasta inside and simple wheat illustrations on a white background.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Essential Waitrose branding, wheat illustration, and a large clear window revealing the penne pasta inside.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a full-height transparent panel with a close-up view of the penne pasta, no branding visible.
description_view_2: Another front view, identical to view 0, with branding, wheat illustration, and clear window showing the pasta.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a transparent panel showing the penne pasta, minimal text visible at the top.
attribute_labeling: Front label includes 'essential Waitrose penne', wheat illustration, 'made with 100% Italian durum wheat'; no visible nutritional or cooking information.
attribute_placement: standing upright on a flat surface
